plugins.name: llm-observability
plugins.description: 19 ready-to-use skills for LLM observability across the full lifecycle: instrument, eval datasets, evals, eval-driven dev, prompt optimization, trace-based testing, user feedback, debug, reduce cost, resilience/fallbacks, RAG quality, hallucination detection, model comparison, multi-agent tracing, guardrails, red-teaming, drift alerts, PII-safe tracing, tool selection.
